attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
    
        The image of the scene has been provided.
        Please first analyze the image and then generate the PDDL problem.
        
    The robot is initially not at any object's location. It needs to first go to a location to interact with an object. If an object A can hold another object B, it is a receptacle and must be recognized as such.
    Instruction: Place a cooled bread slice into the microwave.
    

SCENE CAPTION:
The scene is a kitchen environment with various objects placed on a round white table and a tiled countertop. The floor is covered with beige square tiles, and the walls are a light beige color with matching tiled backsplash.

Relevant objects and their types:
- **Receptacles**: 
  - A black microwave is mounted above the countertop. It is a receptacle and has a digital keypad and a handle. It is currently not open.
  - A black refrigerator is visible with a smooth front surface. It is a receptacle and has four colorful letter magnets (A, B, C, P) attached to its door. It is currently closed.
  - A round white table serves as a surface for many items. While not explicitly a receptacle in the domain, it holds objects and can be considered a location for interaction.
  - A wooden countertop with a built-in stovetop is present. It holds a knife and a spoon. It is not a receptacle but a surface.

- **Objects**:
  - Two brown bread loaves are on the white table. One is closer to the foreground, and the other is near the back. They are rectangular and have a textured crust.
  - A red tomato is on the table, near the center, with a green stem visible.
  - A green rectangular object (possibly a sponge or a block) is on the table to the left of the tomato.
  - A salt shaker and a pepper shaker are on the table, near the tomato.
  - A roll of paper towels is on the table, near the back.
  - Two brown eggs are on the table, near the paper towels.
  - A metal spoon is on the table, near the top left.
  - A knife with a yellow handle is on the wooden countertop, next to a spoon.
  - A black toaster is on the countertop, to the left of the tomato. It has two slots and a lever.
  - A bottle (possibly wine) is on the table, partially visible on the left side.
  - Two metal mugs are on the table, near the top left.
  - A metal cup is on the table, near the mugs.

Spatial relationships and current state:
- The two bread loaves are on the table, not inside any receptacle. They are not sliced, not heated, and not cooled.
- The tomato is on the table, not sliced, not heated, and not cooled.
- The knife is on the countertop, not held by any agent, and not used for slicing yet.
- The microwave is closed and not toggled on. It is empty.
- The refrigerator is closed and not opened. It is empty in terms of visible contents.
- The toaster is on the countertop, not in use, and not toggled on.
- The agent is not at any location initially and does not hold any object.

Colors and distinguishing features:
- The bread loaves are dark brown with a rough texture.
- The tomato is bright red with a green stem.
- The knife has a yellow handle and a silver blade.
- The microwave is black with a red front panel and a digital display.
- The refrigerator is black with colorful letter magnets.
- The table is white with a glossy surface, reflecting light.
- The countertop is wooden with a light brown finish.

The task requires placing a cooled bread slice into the microwave. This implies the bread must first be sliced, then cooled in the refrigerator, and finally placed in the microwave. The current state shows no bread is sliced or cooled, and the microwave is empty and closed.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.
Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:

```pddl
(define (problem place_cooled_bread_slice_in_microwave)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        fridge1 - fridge
        sink1 - sink
        knife1 - knife
        bread1 - object
        bread2 - object
        tomato1 - object
        salt_shaker1 - object
        pepper_shaker1 - object
        paper_towel_roll1 - object
        egg1 - object
        egg2 - object
        spoon1 - object
        toaster1 - object
        bottle1 - object
        mug1 - object
        mug2 - object
        cup1 - object
        table1 - object
        countertop1 - object
    )
    (:init
        (not (atLocation agent1 microwave1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 fridge1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bread1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bread2))
        (not (atLocation agent1 tomato1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 salt_shaker1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 pepper_shaker1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 paper_towel_roll1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 egg1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 egg2))
        (not (atLocation agent1 spoon1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 toaster1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 bottle1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 mug1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 mug2))
        (not (atLocation agent1 cup1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 table1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 countertop1))

        (openable microwave1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (opened microwave1) ; Assuming microwave is initially open for simplicity, as not specified
        (opened fridge1) ; Assuming fridge is initially open for simplicity, as not specified

        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (isClean bread1))
        (not (isClean bread2))
        (not (isHot bread1))
        (not (isHot bread2))
        (not (isCool bread1))
        (not (isCool bread2))
        (not (isSliced bread1))
        (not (isSliced bread2))
        (not (isOn microwave1))
        (not (isToggled microwave1))
        (not (isOn fridge1))
        (not (isToggled fridge1))

        (atLocation agent1 table1) ; Agent starts at table for initial interaction
        (atLocation bread1 table1)
        (atLocation bread2 table1)
        (atLocation tomato1 table1)
        (atLocation salt_shaker1 table1)
        (atLocation pepper_shaker1 table1)
        (atLocation paper_towel_roll1 table1)
        (atLocation egg1 table1)
        (atLocation egg2 table1)
        (atLocation spoon1 table1)
        (atLocation bottle1 table1)
        (atLocation mug1 table1)
        (atLocation mug2 table1)
        (atLocation cup1 table1)

        (atLocation knife1 countertop1)
        (atLocation toaster1 countertop1)
        (atLocation microwave1 countertop1) ; Microwave is mounted, so location is countertop
        (atLocation fridge1 countertop1) ; Fridge is adjacent, so location is countertop

        (inReceptacle bread1 table1)
        (inReceptacle bread2 table1)
        (inReceptacle tomato1 table1)
        (inReceptacle salt_shaker1 table1)
        (inReceptacle pepper_shaker1 table1)
        (inReceptacle paper_towel_roll1 table1)
        (inReceptacle egg1 table1)
        (inReceptacle egg2 table1)
        (inReceptacle spoon1 table1)
        (inReceptacle bottle1 table1)
        (inReceptacle mug1 table1)
        (inReceptacle mug2 table1)
        (inReceptacle cup1 table1)

        (inReceptacle knife1 countertop1)
        (inReceptacle toaster1 countertop1)
        (inReceptacle microwave1 countertop1)
        (inReceptacle fridge1 countertop1)
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle bread1 microwave1)
        (isCool bread1)
        (isSliced bread1)
    ))
)
```

SCENE CAPTION:
The scene is a kitchen environment with various objects placed on a round white table and on tiled countertops. The goal is to place a cooled bread slice into the microwave.

**Objects and their types:**

- **Receptacles:**
    - **Microwave:** A red and black microwave oven mounted above a countertop. It is a receptacle and is currently not opened. It is not turned on.
    - **Fridge:** A dark gray refrigerator with colorful letter magnets (A, B, C, P) on its front. It is a receptacle and is currently closed.
    - **Sink:** Not visible in any of the provided images, so its state and location are unknown.

- **Objects:**
    - **Bread:** Two brown, rectangular slices of bread are on the white table. They are not sliced, not heated, and not cooled.
    - **Knife:** A knife with a yellow handle is lying on a wooden countertop near a stove. It is not being held by any agent.
    - **Tomato:** A red tomato is on the white table. It is not sliced.
    - **Salt Shaker:** A white salt shaker with a silver top is on the white table.
    - **Pepper Shaker:** A white pepper shaker with a silver top is on the white table.
    - **Roll of Paper Towels:** A gray roll of paper towels is on the white table.
    - **Eggs:** Two brown eggs are on the white table.
    - **Mugs:** Two silver mugs are on the white table.
    - **Spoon:** A metal spoon is on the white table.
    - **Green Book:** A green book is on the white table.
    - **Toaster:** A black toaster is on a countertop, next to the tomato and a salt shaker.
    - **Bottle:** A dark green bottle is on the white table.
    - **Cup:** A silver cup is on the white table.

**Quantities:**

- 1 Microwave
- 1 Fridge
- 2 Bread slices
- 1 Knife
- 1 Tomato
- 2 Salt/Pepper shakers (1 each)
- 1 Roll of paper towels
- 2 Eggs
- 2 Mugs
- 1 Spoon
- 1 Green book
- 1 Toaster
- 1 Bottle
- 1 Cup

**Spatial Relationships:**

```pddl
(define (problem place_cooled_bread_in_microwave)

        robot - agent
        microwave - microwave
        fridge - fridge

        mug1 mug2 - object
        spoon - object
        book - object
        bottle - object
        cup - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Receptacles are openable
        (openable microwave)
        (openable fridge)

        (atLocation robot table) ; Assume robot starts at table for simplicity, though not specified
        (atLocation bread1 table)
        (atLocation bread2 table)
        (atLocation knife countertop)
        (atLocation microwave countertop) ; Microwave is mounted above countertop
        (atLocation fridge countertop) ; Fridge is on floor, but we'll treat its location as countertop for simplicity
        (atLocation toaster countertop)

        (atLocation pepper_shaker table)

        (atLocation egg2 table)

        (atLocation mug2 table)
        (atLocation spoon table)
        (atLocation book table)

        (not (isSliced bread2))
        (not (isHot bread1))
        (not (isHot bread2))
        (not (isCool bread1))
        (not (isCool bread2))
```

        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (isOn microwave))
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isClean knife))
        (not (isClean bread1))
        (not (isClean bread2))
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (inReceptacle bread1 microwave)
            (isCool bread1)
            (isSliced bread1)
        )
    )
)

attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

```pddl
        (not (isSliced bread2))
```
